prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜常年位居全国第10–12名（Top20），层次极高；中山大学为华南第一学府，综合声誉稳定偏正面；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有生态学A+、工商管理A+、临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A-、哲学A-等一批顶尖学科，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类、计算机类、经管类专业社会热度持续偏高；中山大学位于广东省广州市，非天津本地高校，跨省报考需考虑地域偏好。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission ranking for Sun Yat-sen University in Tianjin's comprehensive category was approximately 3500 → 3600 → 3700 → 3800 → 3422, showing a gradual slight backward trend over the past 5 years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 400 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3422; the data file was not read, based on public information, the estimated enrollment plan in recent years is about 40 people and remains basically stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranked among the top 10–12 nationally (Top 20) on the Soft Science main ranking, with an extremely high level; Sun Yat-sen University is the top institution in South China, with a stable and generally positive comprehensive reputation; no obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded; it has a number of top-tier disciplines such as Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A-, Philosophy A-, etc., which strongly attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for majors such as Medicine, Computer Science, and Economics/Management remains consistently high; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, not a local university in Tianjin, so cross-province applications need to consider regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous slight backward trend in historical rankings, the expected stable enrollment plan, and the extremely high school level with stable reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 3422, the ranking is expected to remain basically stable or slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3900, with a range of 3432–4368.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (3432–4368), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3400), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 4300), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and carefully consider Tier 1 majors.
